turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tony's Pizza, Austin. What can I get started for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hey, can I do a pickup order? One large pepperoni.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure thing. One large pepperoni for pickup. Want a salad or any drinks with that?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yeah, a Caesar — no croutons, please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Large pepperoni and a Caesar, no croutons. Comes to twenty-two fifty, about twenty minutes. Can I grab a name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks Mike. See you in twenty.
